about.description: A personal archive of games, creators, food, and tools I care about.

hero.title: Hi, I'm {name}
hero.subtitle: I build websites that help local businesses grow.
hero.description: From flower shops to salons, from repair shops to bakeries — I turn your business into a website that customers trust and visit every day.

about.title: Who I am
about.p1: I am a local web designer. I work with small business owners — not big corporations — to build clean, easy-to-use websites that actually attract customers.
about.p2: No confusing jargon, no hassle. You'll always know exactly what you're getting and why.

works.title: What I can build for you
works.hint: Demo sites — click for a preview

items.description: A demo site showing online ordering, seasonal catalogs, and delivery scheduling for a flower shop.
A demo site showing appointment booking, stylist profiles, and service menus for a salon.
A demo site showing repair request tracking, parts management, and customer notifications.
A demo site showing custom cake orders, portfolio showcase, and pickup scheduling.
A demo site showing service packages, before/after gallery, and online booking.

items.name: Maria Santos
items.quote: Online orders doubled in the first month. Customers love how easy it is to order.

items.name: James Park
items.quote: The repair tracking system saved us from endless back-and-forth messages. Truly efficient.

items.name: Aisha Nguyen
items.quote: Booking used to be a mess. Now it runs itself, and our no-show rate dropped to nearly zero.

steps.title: Consult
steps.desc: Tell me about your business. I'll map out exactly what you need.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: I design and develop your site. You review and approve each step.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Your site goes live. I handle hosting, domain, and setup.
